name: iobroker.duosidaems
description: ioBroker adapter for Duosida / SmartCharge / DS Charge wallboxes with automatic LAN discovery, cleaned telemetry, local TCP and cloud fallback
author: Dominique

scripts.check:syntax: node --check main.js && node --check lib/status.js && node --check lib/protobuf.js && node --check lib/localClient.js && node --check lib/discovery.js && node --check lib/cloudClient.js && node --check lib/objectDefinitions.js && node --check lib/snapshotTools.js
